subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of God! Today I returned from Boston to New York. In Boston it was most pleasant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذبه بنفحات الله از بستن امروز مراجعت بنیویورک شد در بستن بسیار خوب
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha
